name: norma
description: Norma — an enforceable, bilingual web design standard for humans and AI agents.

scripts.build: npm run build:rules && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.lint:self: npm run build --workspace norma-design-lint && node packages/design-lint/dist/cli.js index.html
scripts.validate:tokens: npm run build --workspace norma-design-lint && node packages/design-lint/dist/cli.js tokens validate standard/tokens.tokens.json
